title: [Comb] divs folder produces value of incorrect type

features.name: signed division with arithmetic right shift operand
features.description: Code should include a signed division operation where the dividend is an arithmetic right shift of a signed operand, with the shift amount being a signed value of different width than the dividend

features.name: signed division of operands with different widths
features.description: Code should include a signed division where the dividend and divisor have different bit widths, and the dividend is the result of another comb operation
